[type]
CompositeLexer

[grammar]
lexer grammar M;
import ANTLRv4Lexer;

[slaveGrammar]
lexer grammar S;
A : 'a' {<writeln("\"S.A\"")>};
C : 'c' ;

[input]
lexer grammar S;
A : 'a' {print("S.A", file=self._output)};
C : 'c' ;

[output]
[@0,0:4='lexer',<38>,1:0]
[@1,5:5=' ',<12>,channel=2,1:5]
[@2,6:12='grammar',<40>,1:6]
[@3,13:13=' ',<12>,channel=2,1:13]
[@4,14:14='S',<71>,1:14]
[@5,15:15=';',<53>,1:15]
[@6,16:16='\n',<12>,channel=2,1:16]
[@7,17:17='A',<71>,2:0]
[@8,18:18=' ',<12>,channel=2,2:1]
[@9,19:19=':',<50>,2:2]
[@10,20:20=' ',<12>,channel=2,2:3]
[@11,21:23=''a'',<8>,2:4]
[@12,24:24=' ',<12>,channel=2,2:7]
[@13,25:57='{print("S.A", file=self._output)}',<1>,2:8]
[@14,58:58=';',<53>,2:41]
[@15,59:59='\n',<12>,channel=2,2:42]
[@16,60:60='C',<71>,3:0]
[@17,61:61=' ',<12>,channel=2,3:1]
[@18,62:62=':',<50>,3:2]
[@19,63:63=' ',<12>,channel=2,3:3]
[@20,64:66=''c'',<8>,3:4]
[@21,67:67=' ',<12>,channel=2,3:7]
[@22,68:68=';',<53>,3:8]
[@23,69:68='<EOF>',<-1>,3:9]
